description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic color scheme of orange, black, blue, and white. The upper is primarily black with orange overlays and blue accents around the heel collar, while the midsole is white with a visible air unit, characteristic of Nike Air Max designs. The side of the shoe displays a large white Nike Swoosh and the words 'AIR MAX' in white, while the heel features a bold 'NIKE AIR' logo in white against a black and blue background. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with black laces and a padded tongue. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather, mesh, and rubber materials for comfort and durability. The sneaker appears new, with no visible signs of wear or dirt, and is designed for urban and athletic use.
description: A new, multi-colored Nike Air Max sneaker with orange, black, blue, and white panels, featuring a visible air unit and prominent branding. The shoe has a standard lacing system and a cushioned, sporty design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe box in orange, black tongue with a small logo patch, and the lacing system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large white Nike Swoosh, 'AIR MAX' text, and the visible air unit in the white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'NIKE AIR' logo in white on a black and blue heel panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the Swoosh and air unit, with blue and orange color blocking.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the side, 'NIKE AIR' in white on the heel, small logo patch on the tongue
